flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lakeland Community College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5k → 2.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lakeland Community College fell 10% between 2006 and 2009 (12.6% → 11.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lakeland Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
